title: funastrum lineare var. heterophyllum
intro: Funastrum lineare var. heterophyllum, also known as "Snake Root" or "Mazatec Snakeroot," is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Funastrum lineare var. heterophyllum are said to include relief from muscle and joint pain, as well as reduced inflammation and fever. Herbal preparations of Funastrum lineare var. heterophyllum are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
